name: Federal Bank Celesta Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter (subject to minimum spend of Rs 60,000 in the preceding quarter).
international: 2 complimentary international airport lounge visits per calendar year.

milestones.label: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 600 on spending Rs 10,000 within first 30 days of card issuance

milestoneBenefits: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 600 on spending Rs 10,000 within the first 30 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: Buy One Get One complimentary INOX movie ticket (once per quarter)
Up to 15% off at partner hotels via FedDelights dining program
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible transactions (Rs 400–Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 150 per month)

salaried: Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines
selfEmployed: Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Network confirmed as Mastercard per official Federal Bank page title (Federal Bank Mastercard Celesta Credit Card). Visa variant is available but Mastercard is the primary promoted variant.
Fees confirmed as Lifetime Free (nil joining and annual fee).
Rewards follow a 3-2-1 structure: 3x on travel and international spends, 2x on dining, 1x on all other retail.
Domestic lounge access: 2 visits per quarter, subject to minimum spend of Rs 60,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
International lounge access: 2 visits per year.
Forex markup confirmed at 2% (reduced from the standard 3.5%).
Welcome benefit: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 600 on spending Rs 10,000 within the first 30 days.
Reward point value estimated at Rs 0.25 per point on statement credit redemption.
